title: Gambling and Sports Book Writers and Runners
description: Post information enabling patrons to wager on various races and sporting events. Assist in the operation of games such as keno and bingo. May operate random number-generating equipment and announce the numbers for patrons. Receive, verify, and record patrons' wagers. Scan and process winning tickets presented by patrons and pay out winnings for those wagers.

tasks.text: Collect bets in the form of cash or chips, verifying and recording amounts.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Collect cards or tickets from players.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute and verify amounts won or lost, paying out winnings or referring patrons to workers, such as gaming cashiers, so that winnings can be collected.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer questions about game rules or casino policies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct gambling tables or games, such as dice, roulette, cards, or keno, and ensure that game rules are followed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate games in which players bet that a ball will come to rest in a particular slot on a rotating wheel, performing actions such as spinning the wheel and releasing the ball.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Exchange paper currency for playing chips or coins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compare the house hand with players' hands to determine the winner.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open or close cash floats or game tables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pay off or move bets as established by game rules and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start gaming equipment that randomly selects numbered balls and announce winning numbers and colors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check to ensure that all players have placed their bets before play begins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect cards or equipment to be used in games to ensure they are in proper condition.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Record the number of tickets cashed and the amount paid out after each race or event.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Prepare collection reports for submission to supervisors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deliver tickets, cards, and money to bingo callers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sell food, beverages, or tobacco to players.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise staff and games and mediate disputes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
